The Gentlemen (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $36,471,796Details
International Box Office $76,680,426
Worldwide Box Office $113,152,222
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,650,501
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,480,105
Total $5,130,606
Further financial details...

Synopsis

American expat Mickey Pearson built a highly profitable marijuana empire in London. When word gets out that he’s looking to cash out of the business forever it triggers plots, schemes, bribery, and blackmail in an attempt to steal his domain out from under him.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,651,884 (29.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$22,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,165 opening theaters/2,675 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $47,516,637

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 24th, 2020 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: December 27th, 2019 (Wide) (Australia)
January 1st, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
January 2nd, 2020 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 24th, 2020 (Wide) (Middle East Region)
January 24th, 2020 (Wide) (Taiwan)
Video Release: March 24th, 2020 by STX Entertainment
April 27th, 2020 by Entertainment in Video
MPA Rating: R for violence, language throughout, sexual references and drug content.
(Rating bulletin 2604 (Cert #52394), 11/13/2019)
Running Time: 113 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Geographical setting: England, London, United Kingdom

Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English

Synopsis

American expat Mickey Pearson built a highly profitable marijuana empire in London. When word gets out that he’s looking to cash out of the business forever it triggers plots, schemes, bribery, and blackmail in an attempt to steal his domain out from under him.
